name: Systematic Technique Taxonomy for Parameter Golf
author: robbiebusinessacc
summary: Comprehensive taxonomy of all known techniques with measured BPB deltas, tier rankings, interaction effects matrix, BPB verification checklist, quantization guide, TTT best practices, parameter budget calculator, and n-gram validity analysis. Synthesizes findings from 20+ merged PRs, 880+ open PRs, and related research PRs (#363, #831, #756, #670, #886).
